prestazioni: Replace the stock Y-block V8 (engine code: E-code 292 CID) with a fully built Ford Y-block 312 CID stroker kit from Mummert Racing, featuring forged internals (Crower forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE forged pistons with a 10.5:1 compression ratio), paired with a custom-ground Comp Cams hydraulic roller camshaft (280° duration, 0.550" lift) for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery.

Install a custom-built Kinsler cross-ram fuel injection system with dual 450 CFM throttle bodies, paired with a Holley Dominator ECU and dual Aeromotive A1000 fuel pumps, ensuring precise fuel delivery for the high-flowing Edelbrock Y-block aluminum cylinder heads (ported and polished with 2.08" intake/1.60" exhaust valves).

Upgrade the drivetrain with a Tremec TKO 600 5-speed manual transmission (modified with a McLeod twin-disc clutch and steel flywheel) and a Ford 9" rear end with a Detroit Locker differential, 3.70:1 gearing, and Moser Engineering axles for durability under high-torque conditions.
estetica: Apply a custom 3-stage paint scheme by House of Kolor using their Kandy Apple Red base with a gold pearl mid-coat and clear-coated with a high-gloss PPG Deltron finish, complemented by a hand-formed steel hood scoop from Brookville Roadsters for a retro-modern aesthetic.

Install a full custom interior by Paul Atkins Designs, featuring a reupholstered bench seat in red and white Italian Nappa leather with diamond-stitching, a custom billet aluminum dashboard with Vintage Air A/C controls, and a retro-styled steering wheel by Ididit with a Ford Thunderbird emblem inlay.

Fit a custom widebody conversion kit by Ringbrothers, including hand-formed steel fender flares, a smoothed and tucked firewall, and a custom stainless steel exhaust system with dual 3.5" polished tips exiting through the rear valence, paired with a set of 18x8 front and 18x10 rear Billet Specialties wheels wrapped in BFGoodrich g-Force Comp-2 A/S tires (235/45R18 front, 275/40R18 rear).
